game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Overlay custom crosshairs on every game you play. Choose from thousands of unique crosshairs created by the Crosshair X community or design your own using the designer. Get a competitive edge by customizing your crosshair to be clear and precise on every game you play. You can start out with a featured pro Crosshair or a community design, then make adjustments to create a custom gaming solution that takes your aim to the next level.

Features:

  • Community: Explore thousands of designs created by the Crosshair X community
  • Designer: Easy to use sliders let you adjust all features of your crosshair
  • Exclusive Fullscreen with Game Bar Extension: Game bar is a trusted and secure game overlay platform that is built by Microsoft for PC gamers. This is by far the safest and most secure way to overlay games.
  • Share: Share your favorite designs with your friends
  • Images: Upload any image you want to overlay as a Crosshair
  • Toggle: Toggle the visibility of your crosshair with many different mouse states and keyboard shortcuts
  • Positions: Display your crosshair on any monitor and manage saved positions for different games
  • Export: Save your crosshair to your computer as a .PNG or .SVG

Customization Options:

  • Lines: Opacity, Length, Width, Offset, Color, Blur, Rotation
  • Center dot: Opacity, Size, Color, Blur
  • Outlines: Opacity, Thickness, Color, Blur
  • T-Shape: Remove top Crosshair arm never, always, or only when firing
  • Bloom: Make the crosshair spread apart when firing
  • Location: Adjust the X and Y coordinates of the crosshair
game_info.description: Welcome to Crosshair Designer! Design and test your perfect crosshair for competitive gaming. Use the designer to customize every aspect of your crosshair - adjust line length, width, color, opacity, add center dots, outlines, and more. Test your designs in target practice mode where you'll need to aim and shoot at moving targets. Create a crosshair that helps you achieve perfect accuracy!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate designer options / Move in target practice mode
Space: Shoot in target practice mode / Select option in designer
Z: Toggle between Designer Mode and Target Practice Mode
Shift: Hold to fine-tune adjustments in designer
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic navigation through the crosshair designer interface. Validates that the player can move between different customization options and adjust values using keyboard controls.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all designer menu options using arrow keys. Make several adjustments to different parameters. Switch between designer and target practice modes to ensure smooth transitions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate all menu options without errors. All adjustments are properly applied to the crosshair. Mode switching works correctly. Test is successful when all designer features are accessed and function properly.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate all menu options without errors. All adjustments are properly applied to the crosshair. Mode switching works correctly. Test is successful when all designer features are accessed and function properly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete gameplay loop including crosshair design and target practice accuracy. This validates the win condition by hitting all targets with a customized crosshair.
TEST_2.strategy_description: First, design an optimal crosshair with maximum visibility (bright color, moderate size, good contrast). Switch to target practice mode. Track target positions and shoot them accurately to achieve the required hit count for victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully create a functional crosshair design, switch to target practice mode, and hit the required number of targets to trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when win condition is met with a good accuracy rate.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests rapid customization changes and extreme parameter values. Validates that the crosshair rendering handles edge cases like maximum/minimum values for all properties.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Quickly cycle through options and set extreme values (minimum and maximum) for each parameter. Test combinations like very large crosshairs with high opacity, tiny crosshairs with outlines, and various color combinations.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Crosshair renders correctly at all parameter extremes without visual glitches or errors. All combinations produce valid visual output. Test succeeds when no rendering errors occur with extreme values.
TEST_3.description: Tests rapid customization changes and extreme parameter values. Validates that the crosshair rendering handles edge cases like maximum/minimum values for all properties.
TEST_3.strategy: Quickly cycle through options and set extreme values (minimum and maximum) for each parameter. Test combinations like very large crosshairs with high opacity, tiny crosshairs with outlines, and various color combinations.
TEST_3.expected: Crosshair renders correctly at all parameter extremes without visual glitches or errors. All combinations produce valid visual output. Test succeeds when no rendering errors occur with extreme values.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests target practice mechanics including movement, shooting accuracy, and collision detection. Validates that hits are properly registered and score increases correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Focus entirely on target practice mode. Move player character to optimal shooting positions. Fire at targets with precise timing to test collision detection accuracy. Intentionally miss some shots to test miss handling.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: All hits are accurately detected and scored. Misses don't register false positives. Target spawning and movement work smoothly. Score tracking is accurate. Test succeeds when hit detection is 100% reliable.

TEST_4.expected: All hits are accurately detected and scored. Misses don't register false positives. Target spawning and movement work smoothly. Score tracking is accurate. Test succeeds when hit detection is 100% reliable.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests the progression system where players must design increasingly precise crosshairs for harder targets. Validates difficulty scaling and learning curve.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Play through multiple rounds, adjusting crosshair design between attempts. Start with basic designs, then optimize based on performance. Test if better designs lead to better scores on faster-moving targets.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Clear correlation between crosshair design quality and performance. Difficulty increases appropriately. Players can learn and improve through iteration. Test succeeds when optimization leads to measurably better results.
